text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the early hour, I can hear Bamboo
Memory enthusiastically greeting everyone at the
academy gate.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yup! I'm super well-rested from my day off!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I even woke up before my alarm today! I started
the day off with a win and I'm feeling great!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: From here on out, I'm giving 110 percent!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bamboo Memory seems to be well-rested.
